titleStmt.title: SII 15.527: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 527. (B.K. No. 44 of 1929-30.) MAṬHKAL-DĒVANAHAḶḶI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up before the Rāmaliṅga temple.

This is dated Śaka 943, Dundubhi, Paushya ba. 14, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The date is irregular. In Dundubi corresponding to Śaka 944 1022 A.D., the śaṁkrānti occurred on December 24, Monday, the tithi being Pausha ba. 13. In the previous year, Durmati, Śaka 943=1021 A.D., the Saṁkrānti occurred on DeceMber 24, Sunday, the tithi being Pausha ba. 2.
It records a gift of land and house-site to the god Kalidēva of Sāvaḷigi by Tantrapāla Veṇṇamayya-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

śrīmatu taṁtrapāla veṇnamayya nā
yakaṁ sakhava¨rṣa 943 neya duṁ
dubhi saṁvatsarada pauśya bahuḷa 14
Ādivāra Uta rāyaṇa śaṁkrān�i yaṁ
du sāvaḷigaya kalidēvasvāmige
ṭṭake koṭṭayara mattaru 12 niyōjya
mattaru 2 sa¨rvvanamasya maneya nivēsana 1
[Oṁ]du dha¨rmmama rakṣisidava¨rgge vāraṇāsi
yoḷu sāsira kavileyaṁ sā
si¨rvva¨rvvēdapāraga¨rgge koṭṭa phala .
Idarāvanō¨rvvanaḷi�nā kavileyanā
brāhmaṇarumanaḷida dōṣamakkuṁ .
bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissaga
rādibhi¨ryyasya yasya yadā bhoviḥ ta
sya tasya tedā phalaṁ . svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rśasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē kṛmi .
